name: general-coding-practices
description: General coding project practices for diagnosing problems before adding fallbacks or workarounds.

interface.shortDescription: Find root causes before adding fallbacks.
interface.longDescription: Guides Codex to identify the essential root cause of coding problems before deciding whether fallback behavior, guards, retries, defaults, or workarounds are warranted.
defaultPrompt: Debug this failure and find the root cause.
Fix this bug without adding unnecessary fallback behavior.
Review whether this fallback is justified by the root cause.
